response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including C, C++, D, Python-like JS/TS), and open-source leadership, but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation platforms, telemetry systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks at scale — key requirements for this role. Her work in metrics-heavy systems (e.g., real-time data, pricing optimization) is promising but not framed around experimentation or feature flagging.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across C, C++, JS/TS, D, and Python-adjacent ecosystems
Proven ability to design and ship open-source infrastructure (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) used by real teams
Strong technical leadership via workshops, mentoring, and cross-team tooling contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of building or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout automation systems
Lacks documented experience with telemetry infrastructure, guardrails, or statistical analysis for A/B testing
Experience with AI tools to accelerate engineering velocity is implied but not demonstrated or quantified
